prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-8INPOCKETKNIFE-PARENT Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Patriotic Locking American Flag Pocket Knife Collectible, 8 Inch Gift Piece (2 Styles) Description: Be prepared while exploring out in the wilderness in style with the ASR Outdoor Animal Head Collectible Pocket Knife.

This pocket knife features a patriotic design with a majestic American flag on the handle. The blade is constructed of durable steel and is about 3" in length. The knife unfolds to an overall length of 8", and folds to a length of just 5", making it a perfect size for a pocket, small bag or backpack when not in use.

The handle features a comfortable ergonomic design, and the pocket knife comes with a decorative box so you can display it when not in use. This is a must-have pocket knife for hunters, campers, knife collectors and patriots alike. Search Terms: patriotic gifts for men collector knives american flag rebel stuff bald eagle gifts for him folding pocket knife dad outdoorsman under 20 dollars howling moon wolf soaring eagle Features: - AMERICAN FLAG POCKET KNIFE: A patriotic gift for men, featuring a vivid design of a soaring bald eagle or howling wolf with the stars and stripes of the USA flag on the handle; perfect for any knife collection, a pocket knife for men showcasing a detailed animal head on the pommel - FOLDING POCKET KNIFE SIZE: Unfolds to 8 inches overall; 5 inches folded; 3 inch clip point blade; ideal American flag knife for pockets, backpacks and makes a great gift for men stocking stuiffers for Christmas - QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: Made of durable stainless steel that wont rust; great for hunting and camping; handle features a decorative animal head pommel at the base made from ABS - LOCKING MECHANISM: Simple back lock mechanism that allows the blade to be locked in place and unlocked to fold up; smooth and easy to open and close; low maintenance lubrication will allow for a long life of use from this pocket knife - USA FLAG COLLECTIBLE KNIFE: High quality American bald eagle or howling worlf theme with the American flag design; Great for gift presentation === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 8 Inch Patriotic American Flag Pocket Knife

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 8-in Patriotic Locking Pocket Knife Collectible

anthropic.title_differentiation: Folding Locking Mechanism, Stainless Steel Blade, Bald Eagle And Wolf Design, Collectible Gift, Includes Display Box

openai.title_differentiation: American Flag Eagle Or Wolf Handle, 3" Stainless Steel Blade, Back Lock, Gift Box, 8" Overall, Pocket Friendly
